name: rag-it-support
description: Internal generative-AI assistant for IT support on Retrieval Augmented Generation, with OWASP-LLM-aligned guardrails: prompt-injection prevention, data-leakage controls, secure-output enforcement.

name: soar-playbooks
description: Sentinel + Logic Apps SOAR playbooks for data loss prevention, incident response, and identity protection. Block IPs, disable accounts, quarantine uploads, all from a single alert.

name: onetrust-gitlab-bridge
description: Custom REST API integration between OneTrust (GRC) and GitLab (CI/CD) so security assessment reviews land alongside the code change instead of trailing behind a release.

name: f5-decryptor
description: F5 BIG-IP configuration and credential decryptor. Built for an IR engagement where the device-level secrets were the only thread we had to pull.

name: burp-extensions
description: Custom Burp Suite extensions for in-house security testing workflows: a session-aware request replayer and a header-canonicalizer that turned three manual steps into one.

name: phishing-pst-triage
description: Two scripts that parse Outlook PSTs for IOC extraction and triage routing. The first walks a PST and emits a normalized JSON; the second routes by score into the right SOC queue.

name: hybrid-analysis-cli
description: Thin Python wrapper around the Hybrid Analysis REST API for batch lookups of suspected malware. Caches hashes, respects rate limits, returns one merged verdict per submission.
